findings.violation: New `MIXED_FORMAT_BOOKS` adds another hand-built book literal (spread of `TEST_BOOKS` plus inline audiobook row) instead of a shared factory helper.
findings.rule_citation: .claude/rules/testing/test-patterns.md § “NFR Violations to Avoid” / “Code Duplication” (lines 101–104): “❌ NEVER copy-paste seeding logic … ✅ USE factory functions from `tests/support/fixtures/factories/`”; and § “Test Data Management” (lines 108–118): use factories with overrides rather than ad-hoc literals.

residual_risks: No `AGENTS.md` exists anywhere under the Knowlune repository (glob from repo root); this review applied `CLAUDE.md` and path-scoped rules under `.claude/rules/` for the touched file types only.
